meta_description: Acrylic is a translucent/clear material that is tailor made for optical applications and parts that must withstand harsh, outdoor environments.

sections.heading: Acrlyic Material Properties
sections.text: Acrlyic Material Properties Tensile Strength (Yield) Flexural Modulus Tensile Elongation (Break) Rockwell Hardness (M-scale) Data Sheet Test Method ASTM D638 ASTM D790 ASTM D638 ASTM D785 Plexiglas V825 10,200 psi 450,000 psi 6.0% 93 VIEW PDF Uses for Molded Acrylic Parts Acrylic's dimensional stability, UV resistance, durability, and natural transparency make acrylic a good material choice for automotive and consumer products. Lenses Tail light covers Light transmission parts Sanitary fixtures

sections.heading: Uses for Molded Acrylic Parts
sections.text: Uses for Molded Acrylic Parts Acrylic's dimensional stability, UV resistance, durability, and natural transparency make acrylic a good material choice for automotive and consumer products. Lenses Tail light covers Light transmission parts Sanitary fixtures
